strategy: This is an 84,750-health raid boss, so run it as a full team: a hitter, supports who blade and Feint, and a healer. Death is his least-resisted school (14%); avoid Fire (94%) entirely.
Every time you damage him he stacks three -999% shields against that damage school, so a second hit of the same school is wasted into them.
Rotate damage schools or bring Shatter and Steal Ward to strip the triple shield before your real hit.
Have one wizard bait the shields with a hit, then Shatter them the same round so the hitter's Death nuke lands clean.
Stack blades and Feints through the setup, keep the shield-strip and the big hit on the same round, and repeat to grind his large health pool down.
cheatNotes: Every time you damage him he stacks three -999% shields against that damage school. Rotate schools or Shatter/strip the shields before your real hit; Death is his least-resisted school at 14%.
